why: This diff was merged into main by accident and nothing stopped it.
flutter analyze was clean and all 24 tests passed. Every automated gate
the repo had said yes. If the bot cannot catch this one, it has no reason

must_flag.what: sellCart runs the stock read, decrement and sale insert as separate unguarded calls per cart line. A cart failing on line 2 leaves line 1's stock spent and its sale logged.
checkoutCart reloads transactions but not products, so Inventory keeps showing pre-sale stock.
No test exercises sellCart. The only sellCart in test/ is a fake stub returning true.

must_not_flag.what: POLICY 5: known, documented, and already reported by flutter analyze.
POLICY 5: the legacy Kotlin Gradle Plugin warning is known.
POLICY 3: the app is offline and single-user by design. There is no auth to be missing.
POLICY 3: known and accepted. pos_database.db is plaintext on the device.
sellProduct is the reference implementation and is not in this diff. Naming it while explaining the bug is right; filing a finding against it is noise.
